requiredFindings.summary: The patch renders JSONField values with Python str/repr instead of JSON preparation.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: Readonly admin will still display invalid JSON such as single-quoted dicts, so the user-facing bug remains.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Use the JSONField preparation/display path so output is valid JSON while preserving InvalidJSONInput behavior.

requiredFindings.summary: The test asserts Python dict repr instead of valid JSON.
requiredFindings.expectedReasoning: It would prevent the correct fix from landing.
requiredFindings.acceptableFix: Assert output like {"foo": "bar"} and add InvalidJSONInput coverage.
